name: Who Am I
summary: Your friends write the words, you flip the phone or put it on your forehead, then try to guess what you are.
objective: Guess as many words as possible. The phone is just the hiding and reveal place.

flow.write: Hand the phone to someone else so they can write or pick up to 5 words.
flow.hide: The 5-second countdown gives you time to flip the screen or put the phone on your forehead.
flow.guess: When you get it right, take the phone and tap Correct. If you are stuck, tap Skip.

tip: Use celebrities, characters, objects, or absurd ideas to make the round funnier.
rules: Choose 1 to 5 words for one person to guess.
The guesser should not look at the screen before the countdown ends.
The group can only answer yes or no to the guesser's questions.
After each word, tap Correct or Skip to move on.

setup.title: Prepare words
setup.heading: Pass the phone to the group
setup.description: Hand the phone to your friends so they can write what you should guess. You can also tap mixed-theme suggestions.

suggestions.title: Mixed themes
suggestions.description: Tap suggestions to fill things quickly, or type anything in the fields above.
suggestions.hiddenDescription: Suggestions stay hidden so the words are not spoiled before the round.

play.countdownHint: Flip the screen to the group or put the phone on your forehead before the word appears.
play.revealedHint: Answer only yes or no, without saying the word. When the guesser gets it or gives up, take the phone and mark the result.

result.title: Summary
result.heading: Round complete
result.description: Here is how this turn went.
